name: Level Best Golf, Inc.
summary: Level Best Golf, Inc. does not have significant operations. The company was engaged in the development and marketing of golf training aids and related products to domestic and foreign markets. The company's principal product was SCRATCH SCORE GOLF, which consisted of videos that address various facets of the game. Its LEVEL BEST GOLF SYSTEM consisted of engineered plastic components, including Hand Positioner, Loft Indicator, and Lie Detector; a 20-minute instructional video, a carrying pouch, and a bag tag for recording training information specific to each golfer. The company's ONE PUTT PERFECTOR was a training aid designed to help golfers of any skill level develop a pendulum putting stroke. Level Best Golf was incorporated in 1993 and is based in Clearwater, Florida.
